summary: Iteration 51: AI Designer HARD RESET verified - Basic version with multi-room packages working correctly
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate - Endpoint exists and accepts photos, returns renders
✅ POST /api/auth/login - Login with comm2@test.bg works correctly
✅ Header text: 'Качи снимки → получи реалистични 3D рендери' (no budget/360 text)
✅ Room card (room-card-0) visible with room number badge
✅ Room type dropdown (room-type-0) - Хол selected by default
✅ Style dropdown (style-0) - Модерен selected by default
✅ 'Добави стая' button appears with text 'Добави стая (1/2)'
✅ Second room has room-type-1, style-1, photo-grid-1
✅ Remove room button (remove-room-1) with trash icon visible
✅ At max rooms (2/2), add button disappears
✅ Can add up to 5 rooms total
✅ Each room has independent room type, style, 3 photo slots, notes
✅ Switching from pkg 3 to pkg 1 trims excess rooms
✅ Add room button hidden for pkg 1
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user comm2@test.bg
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified the HARD RESET of AI Designer (/room-scan). Key features: 1) Multi-room packages: 69EUR (1 room), 129EUR (2 rooms), 199EUR (5 rooms). 2) Each room has independent room type dropdown, style dropdown, 3 photo slots (Общ план, Ъгъл 1, Ъгъл 2), notes textarea. 3) 'Добави стая' button only appears for packages 2 and 3. 4) Package downgrade trims excess rooms automatically. 5) REMOVED features confirmed: NO PDF, NO fullscreen, NO budget input/tiers. 6) Backend /api/ai-designer/photo-generate endpoint works. Key data-testids: ai-designer-page, package-selection, pkg-1/2/3, room-card-0/1/2/3/4, room-type-0/1, style-0/1, photo-grid-0/1, photo-drop-0-0/0-1/0-2, add-room-btn, remove-room-0/1, generate-btn, notes-0/1. Auth required via AuthGate modal.

package_1_69eur.details: 1 room max, no add-room button, generate shows 69 EUR

package_2_129eur.details: 2 rooms max, add-room button shows (1/2), can add second room

package_3_199eur.details: 5 rooms max, can add up to 5 rooms

room_card_elements.details: Room type dropdown, style dropdown, 3 photo slots, notes textarea

multi_room_add_remove.details: Add room button works, remove button (trash icon) works

package_downgrade_trim.details: Downgrading package trims excess rooms correctly

photo_generate_api.details: Accepts photos and returns renders with id

header_text.details: Shows 'Качи снимки → получи реалистични 3D рендери' - no budget/360 text
